title: Working-identity candidate
description: A portable working-intelligence proposal extracted from an external AI system, runtime observation, or manual operator note. Non-canonical review material — must enter gate/review before promotion to any Record surface.

candidate_id.description: Unique identifier for this candidate. Convention: WI-NNNN.

layer_type.description: Which portable working-intelligence layer this candidate belongs to.

claim.description: One-sentence description of the observation or claim.

sensitivity_class.description: Whether this candidate may contain sensitive or employer-bound content.

portability_class.description: How portable this candidate is across tools and contexts.

proposed_target_surface.description: Which canonical Record surface this candidate should be reviewed against.

source_tool.description: Name of the AI system or tool that produced this candidate.

source_window.description: Approximate time period the source AI observed this pattern (e.g. '2025-01 to 2026-04').

supporting_examples.description: Concrete examples or evidence supporting this claim.

review_status.description: Current review state of this candidate.

review_notes.description: Operator or reviewer notes about this candidate.
